ogTitle: Freemans Waterhole vs Freemantle: Climate Safety

heading: Freemans Waterhole vs Freemantle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freemans Waterhole, New South Wales and Freemantle, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Freemans Waterhole has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Freemantle (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freemans Waterhole or Freemantle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freemans Waterhole has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Freemantle scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freemans Waterhole scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Freemantle scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freemans Waterhole or Freemantle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Freemans Waterhole has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
